Pest Control Services in Haysville, Kansas

Shaw's Pest Control has served Haysville and Sedgwick County since 1987. Whether you're dealing with ants, spiders, termites, mosquitoes, or bed bugs, our licensed and certified team has the experience to solve the problem.

As a locally owned, faith-based company, we approach every job with honesty. Customers come to us with a pest problem and often leave as friends.

Pest Control in Haysville, KS

Yes. Shaw's Pest Control serves Haysville and Sedgwick County. Call (316) 251-9461 for a free estimate.
Common pests in Haysville include spiders (Brown Recluse, Black Widow), ants, German cockroaches, termites, mosquitoes, and bed bugs.
Yes. Shaw's Pest Control offers termite inspections in Haysville for homeowners and prospective buyers.
Shaw's Pest Control serves Haysville regularly. Contact us at (316) 251-9461 to schedule service.
